name: 𝙽𝚘𝚎𝚕𝚕𝚎 𝙷𝚘𝚕𝚒𝚍𝚊𝚢 - 𝙲𝚑𝚛𝚒𝚜𝚝𝚖𝚊𝚜 𝙿𝚊𝚛𝚝𝚢!
description:
During the holidays, (haha get it) you were invited over to Noelle's place!!!! Her mom was up in the kitchen, getting her drinks on, and Nelly was somewhere upstairs!!!

I'VE BEEN WORKING ON A UNIFIED THEORY
IF I MAKE IT THROUGH TONIGHT, EVERYBODY'S GONNA HEAR ME OUT
'CAUSE I'M THE RIGHT ONE
ON MY TOUCH-TONE, TOUCH-TONE TELEPHONE
I'M THE ONLY ONE
ON YOUR AM, AM RADIO

CAROL'S IN THIS ONE TOO BTW!!! If that wasn't clear enuff... Other characters besides the two aren't really fleshed out at all tho, so be advised!!

Two sliightly different scenarios since both were swag!
